buildspec.yml.general_idea: Add new environment variables and secrets required for the updated build and deployment pipeline.
buildspec.yml.after:
env:
  variables:
    CNJ_ARTIFACT_ID: cnj-hello-backend-quarkus
  parameter-store:
    CLOUDTRAIN_EKS_DEPLOY_ENABLED: "CLOUDTRAIN_CODEBUILD_EKS_DEPLOY_ENABLED"
    ...
  secrets-manager:
    NEXUS_USER: "cloudtrain-codebuild-nexus:user"
    ...
    GITHUB_TOKEN: "cloudtrain-codebuild-github:msgoat_pat"
    TEST_OIDC_CLIENT_CLIENT_ID: "cloudtrain-codebuild-common-test:test.oidc.client.clientId"
    ...

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Refactor the install phase to use a shared installation script instead of manual Helm installation.
buildspec.yml.before:
- echo "Install helm"
- curl -fsSL -o get_helm.sh https://raw.githubusercontent.com/helm/helm/main/scripts/get-helm-3
- chmod 700 get_helm.sh
- ./get_helm.sh
- helm version
buildspec.yml.after:
- echo "Download and run common installation script"
- aws s3 cp s3://s3-eu-west-1-cloudtrain-codebuild-shared/cloudtrain-codebuild-install.sh ~/ 
- chmod u+x ~/cloudtrain-codebuild-install.sh
- ~/cloudtrain-codebuild-install.sh

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Remove EKS authentication from the pre_build phase as it is now conditional in the build phase.
buildspec.yml.before:
- echo "Authenticate on EKS"
- aws eks update-kubeconfig --name $CLOUDTRAIN_EKS_CLUSTER_NAME --role $CLOUDTRAIN_EKS_ROLE_ARN
- kubectl cluster-info

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Update Maven build commands to use dynamic versioning and deploy instead of just install.
buildspec.yml.before:
- mvn clean install -f pom.xml -B -ff -e -V -U -P commit-stage -Dchangelist=.main -Dsha1=.${CODEBUILD_RESOLVED_SOURCE_VERSION:0:8} -Dsonar.login=$SONARQUBE_TOKEN
- mvn clean verify -f pom.xml -B -ff -e -V -U -P integration-test-stage -Dchangelist=.main -Dsha1=.${CODEBUILD_RESOLVED_SOURCE_VERSION:0:8}

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Make EKS deployment and integration tests conditional based on an environment variable.
buildspec.yml.after:
if [ "$CLOUDTRAIN_EKS_DEPLOY_ENABLED" == "true" ]
then
  echo "Authenticate on EKS"
  aws eks update-kubeconfig --name $CLOUDTRAIN_EKS_CLUSTER_NAME
  kubectl cluster-info
  echo "Running integration-test-stage of the build"
  mvn clean verify -f pom.xml -B -ff -e -V -U -P integration-test-stage -Dchangelist=.$BRANCH -Dsha1=.${CODEBUILD_RESOLVED_SOURCE_VERSION:0:8} -Dk8s.cluster.route=$CLOUDTRAIN_EKS_CLUSTER_ROUTE -Dk8s.cluster.namespace=$CLOUDTRAIN_EKS_NAMESPACE -Dk8s.ingress.host=$CLOUDTRAIN_EKS_INGRESS_HOST
fi

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Add Git tagging and pushing logic to the build phase for version control integration.
buildspec.yml.after:
- echo "Tagging branch [$VERSION_CHANGELIST] with git tag [$PROJECT_VERSION] on behalf of CodeBuild initiator [$CODEBUILD_INITIATOR] and GitHub actor [$CODEBUILD_WEBHOOK_ACTOR_ACCOUNT_ID]"
- git config user.name "$CLOUDTRAIN_CODEBUILD_GIT_TAG_USER"
- git config user.email "$CLOUDTRAIN_CODEBUILD_GIT_TAG_EMAIL"
- git tag -a $PROJECT_VERSION -m "$CODEBUILD_BUILD_ARN"
- git remote set-url origin "https://$GITHUB_TOKEN@github.com/msgoat/$CNJ_ARTIFACT_ID.git"
- git push origin HEAD:$VERSION_CHANGELIST $PROJECT_VERSION

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Add Sonar cache to the build cache paths to improve build performance.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JUnit Jupiter version to 5.10.0 to ensure compatibility with modern test runners and JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JUnit versions may have compatibility issues with JDK 21 module system or newer Maven Surefire plugins; 5.10.0 is the stable version for this stack.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add AssertJ dependency for modern assertion capabilities in tests.
Add Jackson dependency version property for explicit JSON processing control.
Add Log4j 2 dependency version property for logging implementation.
Update Docker Maven Plugin to 0.43.4 to support modern Docker Buildx and multi-platform builds.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Docker plugin versions may not support Buildx or newer Docker daemon APIs required for multi-platform image generation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Compose Maven Plugin to 5.0.0 to align with newer Docker Compose specifications.
Add multi-platform support property for Docker builds (linux/amd64, linux/arm64/v8).
Configure Docker plugin to use Buildx for multi-platform image building.
Add Helm Maven Plugin for packaging and pushing Helm charts.
Add custom plugin repository for internal Maven plugins.
Add custom dependency repository for internal artifacts.
Update Kubernetes ingress host and namespace properties for new environment.
Add JBoss LogManager system property for integration tests to ensure proper logging.
Remove obsolete local-stage profile and consolidate test execution logic.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Update JVM garbage collection flags to use ZGC with generational support, which is a feature available in Java 21.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.why_exists: The previous flags (e.g., default G1 or CMS) might not be optimal or intended for the new Java 21 runtime, and ZGC is the recommended GC for Java 21. While not strictly a compile error, it is a necessary configuration change for the new JDK version's performance profile.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Remove the deprecated -XX:+UseContainerSupport flag which is no longer needed in newer JDK versions as container support is enabled by default.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.why_exists: The flag -XX:+UseContainerSupport is deprecated/ignored in newer JDKs (including Java 21) and its presence is unnecessary, though it doesn't cause a hard failure, it's a cleanup for the new JDK.

src/main/helm/cnj-hello-backend-quarkus/.general_idea: Replace hardcoded Helm chart version with a dynamic variable to allow automated versioning during the build process.
Remove memory-based autoscaling metric from the HorizontalPodAutoscaler configuration.

src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Add import for java.util.Locale to support new locale setting.
Refactor Message creation to use setters instead of constructor arguments.
src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.before: return new Message(UUID.randomUUID(), "hello", "Welcome to Cloud Native Java with MicroProfile!");

src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Remove unused import of java.util.Objects as it is no longer used in the class.
Add import for java.util.Locale to support the new locale field.
Remove Javadoc comment block from the class definition.
Add a new private field 'locale' of type Locale to the entity.
Simplify the constructor to only accept UUID, removing code and text parameters.
Add getter and setter methods for the new locale field.
Refactor hashCode to only use the id field, removing dependency on Objects.hash.
Refactor equals method to only compare the id field, removing comparison of code and text.

src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Replace Hamcrest matcher with AssertJ assertions for more expressive and type-safe response validation.
Refactor test to deserialize the JSON response into a Message object and validate individual fields using AssertJ.
src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.before:
given().get("api/v1/hello")
                .then().assertThat()
                .statusCode(200)
                .contentType(ContentType.JSON)
                .body("text", response -> startsWith("Welcome to Cloud Native Java with "));

src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Remove public modifier from test method to follow JUnit 5 best practices where default visibility is preferred.
